question: Do you have to purchase subway tickets from a vending machine when taking the subway in Osaka?
answer: No, you can buy tickets on your mobile phone.
response: No, you do not have to purchase subway tickets from a vending machine in Osaka. You can use a Suica or Pasmo IC card, which can be recharged at vending machines or automatically deducted from your account when entering/exiting stations. Vending machines are available for purchasing single tickets or adding funds to IC cards.

Action: [Answer]
Content: No, you do not have to purchase subway tickets from a vending machine in Osaka. You can use a Suica or Pasmo IC card, which can be recharged at vending machines or automatically deducted from your account when entering/exiting stations. Vending machines are available for purchasing single tickets or adding funds to IC cards.
